response.global_analysis: The audio phonetically matches the provided Reference JSON for both 'Mei Tantei Renzoku Satsujin Jiken' and 'Kokoro Okashi'. I have discarded leftover lyrics from the reference that were not performed in this specific video segment. Note: While the reference JSON lists Amane Kanata for the second song, on-screen text and visuals confirm it is Shirakami Fubuki and Ookami Mio. I have strictly aligned timestamps to the vocal audio and preserved semantic continuity across mid-sentence pauses.

subtitles.original: エブリバディ
subtitles.english: Everybody

subtitles.original: アリバイ
subtitles.english: Alibi

subtitles.original: ナイ ナイ ナイ ナイ
subtitles.english: None, none, none, none

subtitles.original: 怪盗の目の 穴にはまり
subtitles.english: Falling into the trap of the phantom thief's eyes,

subtitles.original: 次々と 姿を消していく
subtitles.english: one after another they disappear,

subtitles.original: 名探偵たち
subtitles.english: the great detectives.

subtitles.original: そして 探偵の居ぬ間に
subtitles.english: And while the detective is away,

subtitles.original: 人々の心は 密室となった
subtitles.english: people's hearts became locked rooms.

subtitles.original: 「でも、それならどうしてあたしだけが無事だったんでしょうか？」
subtitles.english: "But then why was I the only one who was safe?"

subtitles.original: 「その答えはひとつしか考えられない」
subtitles.english: "There can only be one answer to that."

subtitles.original: 「と、云うと……？」
subtitles.english: "Which is...?"

subtitles.original: 「あまりに無能すぎるが故に、」
subtitles.english: "Because you are too incompetent,"

subtitles.original: 「きみは探偵として勘定にも入れられていなかったのだ!」
subtitles.english: "you weren't even counted as a detective!"

subtitles.original: 「いーやー!」
subtitles.english: "Nooo!"

subtitles.original: およしになって おやめになって 怪奇事件
subtitles.english: Please stop, please quit this mysterious case.

subtitles.original: おさげ揺らす 探偵さん
subtitles.english: The detective shaking her pigtails,

subtitles.original: 『探偵さん!』
subtitles.english: "Detective!"

subtitles.original: Knock's baby, Got it's baby, 行かないで
subtitles.english: Knock's baby, Got it's baby, don't go.

subtitles.original: a-m-o-r 先生の 意地悪イケズ
subtitles.english: A-M-O-R, Professor's mean trick.

subtitles.original: ロードショートリック ハットトリック
subtitles.english: Roadshow trick, hat trick,

subtitles.original: 難事件
subtitles.english: it's a difficult case.

subtitles.original: 推理作家の先生
subtitles.english: The mystery writer professor.

subtitles.original: うだらうだら 言わないで
subtitles.english: Don't just mumble on and on.

subtitles.original: あぁもう 頭がこんがらがってきたけど
subtitles.english: Ah, my head is getting all tangled up, but...

subtitles.original: 来いよ来いよ トリック
subtitles.english: Come on, come on, trick,

subtitles.original: 甘い接待
subtitles.english: sweet entertainment.

subtitles.original: 通りゃんせ
subtitles.english: Toryanse.

subtitles.original: 小さい2人の子供が約束した、
subtitles.english: Two small children made a promise,

subtitles.original: ずっといっしょに笑っていようの約束。
subtitles.english: a promise to always laugh together.

subtitles.original: 今もなお、2人の絆は確かなもので
subtitles.english: Even now, the bond between the two is certain,

subtitles.original: 友情と愛情が織りなす素敵な物語。
subtitles.english: a wonderful story woven with friendship and love.

subtitles.original: 「あははっ…なんでもないことに、妙にツボっちゃう時あるよねっ」
subtitles.english: "Ahaha... there are times when you just strangely crack up at nothing, right?"

subtitles.original: あぁ 恋に落ち たまゆら 開花 止まらないや
subtitles.english: Ah, the fleeting moment I fell in love, the blooming won't stop.

subtitles.original: 何度も捲って 心をかし
subtitles.english: Flipping through it again and again, the heart is interesting.

subtitles.original: 泣いてばっかだったの それがどうだ今や
subtitles.english: I was always crying, but what about now?

subtitles.original: 腹捩るくらい笑う
subtitles.english: I laugh until my sides hurt.

subtitles.original: ずっと一緒に笑って 心をかし
subtitles.english: Always laughing together, the heart is interesting.

subtitles.original: ずっと一緒に笑う
subtitles.english: Always laughing together.

subtitles.original: 最後の日を笑う
subtitles.english: Laughing on the last day.

subtitles.original: きみが持ってる 白い花に
subtitles.english: In the white flower you hold,

subtitles.original: あたし見合わない 悲しくなる
subtitles.english: I don't fit, it makes me sad.

subtitles.original: 無垢な恋とか 正しさとか
subtitles.english: Innocent love or righteousness,

subtitles.original: 誰も教えてくれなかった
subtitles.english: no one taught me either.

subtitles.original: 昨日会ったばっかで 今日またどっか会えたら
subtitles.english: I met you just yesterday, if I could meet you somewhere today,

subtitles.original: なんて思う暮らし 慎ましいくらいよね
subtitles.english: what a way to live, thinking that. It's quite humble, isn't it?

subtitles.original: 全部許されたの
subtitles.english: Everything was forgiven.

subtitles.original: びっくりしちゃってさ
subtitles.english: I was surprised,

subtitles.original: 涙あふれてたよ
subtitles.english: tears were overflowing.

subtitles.original: もう愛になる花歌 透き通った空
subtitles.english: The flower song that is now love, the clear sky.

subtitles.original: 手をつないでた 夢のしるし
subtitles.english: Hand in hand, a sign of a dream.

subtitles.original: どんな前世だってさ
subtitles.english: Whatever the past life was,

subtitles.original: 忘れたっていいんだ
subtitles.english: it's okay if I forgot it.

subtitles.original: きみと笑えるなら
subtitles.english: If I can laugh with you.

subtitles.original: 心が触れるたび 綺麗な音鳴る
subtitles.english: Every time our hearts touch, a beautiful sound rings.

subtitles.original: 目と目が合って くすぐったいね
subtitles.english: When our eyes meet, it tickles, doesn't it?

subtitles.original: なんでもないこと 妙にツボるね
subtitles.english: I'm strangely drawn to trivial things.

subtitles.original: 全部教えてくれて
subtitles.english: Everything you taught me,

subtitles.original: ありがとう
subtitles.english: thank you.

subtitles.original: きみが持ってる 白い花を
subtitles.english: The white flower you hold,

subtitles.original: あたしの紅色と 合わせたら
subtitles.english: if I combine it with my crimson color,

subtitles.original: 霜が解けては 雲が行く
subtitles.english: the frost melts and the clouds go.

subtitles.original: もう寒くないよ
subtitles.english: It's not cold anymore.

subtitles.original: あぁ 恋に落ち たまゆら 開花 止まらないや
subtitles.english: Ah, the fleeting moment I fell in love, the blooming won't stop.

subtitles.original: 何度も捲って 心をかし
subtitles.english: Flipping through it again and again, the heart is interesting.

subtitles.original: 泣いてばっかだったの それがどうだ今や
subtitles.english: I was always crying, but what about now?

subtitles.original: 腹捩るくらい笑う
subtitles.english: I laugh until my sides hurt.

subtitles.original: ずっと一緒に笑って
subtitles.english: Always laughing together.

subtitles.original: 恋に落ちたまゆら
subtitles.english: In that fleeting moment I fell in love...

subtitles.original: 心をかし
subtitles.english: the heart is interesting.

subtitles.original: 愛になる花歌
subtitles.english: The flower song that becomes love.

subtitles.original: ずっと一緒に笑う
subtitles.english: Always laughing together.

subtitles.original: 最後の日を笑う
subtitles.english: Laughing on the last day.

subtitles.original: これは、遠い遠い 名も知らぬ世界で、
subtitles.english: This is, in a far, far away world with no name...
